morning: Read: Negligence — Duty, Breach, Damage (3 elements). Donoghue v Stevenson. Res ipsa loquitur. Study notes + flashcards.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Negligence principle-fact questions. Focus: identifying all 3 elements in facts.
evening: 10 MCQs: Current Affairs 2025 — Operation Sindoor, Pahalgam attack, D. Gukesh chess.
night: Revise: Res ipsa loquitur, Volenti non fit injuria, Damnum sine injuria, Injuria sine damno.

theme: Law of Torts — Strict/Absolute Liability + Vicarious
morning: Read: Rylands v Fletcher vs M.C. Mehta rule. Vicarious liability in course of employment. Frolic of own.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Strict liability scenarios (factory gas leaks, reservoir bursting). Vicarious liability.
evening: 10 MCQs: Current Affairs — Budget 2025, EFTA FTA, BRICS expansion.
night: Revise: Qui facit per alium, Actus non facit reum, Ignorantia juris, Ubi jus ibi remedium.

theme: Indian Contract Act — Offer, Acceptance, Consideration
morning: Read: Offer vs invitation to treat. Postal rule. Counter-offer. Valid acceptance. Consideration — PASTA rules. Minor's contract.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Contract formation, postal rule, minor's void contract, consideration scenarios.
evening: 10 MCQs: Indian Economy — GST, RBI, GDP growth, Vande Bharat.
night: Revise: Consensus ad idem, Pacta sunt servanda, Quid pro quo, Nemo dat quod non habet.

theme: Indian Contract Act — Void/Voidable + Breach + Remedies
morning: Read: Void (minor/wagering/mistake) vs Voidable (CUFM). Anticipatory breach. Hadley rule. Specific performance. Quantum meruit.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Identify void vs voidable. Breach + remedies principle-fact questions.
evening: 10 MCQs: Indian History — Freedom struggle, key dates (1857, 1919, 1942, 1947).
night: Revise: Ab initio, Uberrima fides, Ex turpi causa, In pari delicto.

theme: IPC / BNS 2023 — Homicide, Exceptions, Private Defence
morning: Read: Murder vs culpable homicide (S.300). 5 PECCE exceptions. Private defence limits. General exceptions: MAGIC. BNS section numbers.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Murder vs culpable homicide distinctions. Private defence proportionality. BNS vs IPC changes.
evening: 10 MCQs: Indian Geography — states, rivers, passes, Tiger reserves.
night: Revise: Nulla poena sine lege, Doli incapax, In dubio pro reo, Actus reus + Mens rea.

theme: IPC — Theft, Robbery, Dacoity + Evidence Act S.25/27 + Family Law
morning: Read: Theft → Robbery → Dacoity chain. Evidence Act: S.25 (confession to police), S.27 (discovery), dying declaration. HMA conditions.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Evidence Act scenarios + Family law void/voidable marriage + Theft-Robbery-Dacoity.
evening: 10 MCQs: Science & Technology — ISRO missions, Nobel prizes, SpaDeX.
night: Revise: Suppressio veri, Falsus in uno, Onus probandi, Audi alteram partem.

theme: Constitutional Law — FRs (Arts 12-35) + DPSP + Basic Structure
morning: Read: Art.12 (State), Art.13 (judicial review), Arts 14-22. Art. 32 vs 226. DPSPs non-justiciable. Kesavananda Bharati basic structure.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Constitutional law MCQs — which article, which amendment, which emergency provision.
evening: 10 MCQs: Polity — Parliament, President, PM powers, constitutional bodies.
night: Revise: Nemo judex in causa sua, Res judicata, Locus standi, Ultra/Intra vires.

theme: GK Intensive — Indian History + Polity + Economy
morning: Study: Freedom struggle timeline (1857-1947). Constitutional history. Key economy schemes (Jan Dhan, GST, PMAY, Jal Jeevan Mission).
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Indian History + Polity + Economy current affairs 2024-25.
evening: 10 MCQs: International affairs — UN, BRICS, G20, geopolitics 2024-25.
night: Revise: Top 20 maxims — rapid fire recall. No notes, just from memory.

morning: Study: BNS 2023 key changes from IPC. BNSS changes from CrPC. BSA changes from Evidence Act. New offences: organised crime, terrorism.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Legal awareness — new criminal laws, important acts, constitutional articles.
evening: 10 MCQs: Awards + Sports + Persons in news 2025.
night: Revise: 15 most tested maxims — write them without looking.

theme: GK — Geography + Science + Current Affairs Revision
morning: Revise: India geography (states, rivers, WHS). Science basics (units, elements, discoveries). Operation Sindoor + Pahalgam attack facts.
afternoon: 40 MCQs: Mixed GK — geography, science, current affairs 2025.
evening: 10 MCQs: Maharashtra-specific GK — geography, politics, culture.
night: Final revision: all 60 maxims — spend 2 minutes per maxim group.

morning: EXAM DAY. Morning: light revision only. Review mnemonics. Do NOT attempt new questions. Eat well, sleep 8h the night before.
afternoon: MH-CET Law Exam — Session 1. Attempt order: Legal Reasoning → GK → Logical → English. Time: 120 min, 120 questions.
evening: After exam: rest. Do NOT review answers obsessively. Prepare for Day 2.
night: Night: only revise 10 weakest maxims + 5 constitutional articles you feel uncertain about.

morning: EXAM DAY 2. Quick breakfast. Read last year cutoff data (GLC 110+, KC Law 100+). Stay calm — attempt all 120 questions (no negative marking).
afternoon: MH-CET Law Exam — Session 2. Strategy: 1 minute per question. Skip and return to hard ones. Guess strategically (no negative marking = always answer).
evening: Exam complete. Results typically in 2-4 weeks. Well done!

morning: Day 13 study session.
afternoon: 80+ questions practice.
evening: 10 GK MCQs.

evening: 10 GK MCQs.
